name: BTI Bank
description: One of the first participative banks in Morocco, established by BMCE Bank of Africa and Al Baraka Banking Group.

tavily.answer:
The official website for BTI Bank is https://www.btig.com. BTIG is now part of U.S. Bancorp. It offers investment banking and institutional sales & trading services.
BTI Bank is not recognized; it likely refers to different entities like BTI Business Technology Information or BTI Payments Pvt Ltd. Verify the correct entity based on industry and location.
Crunchbase is a company founded in 2007, headquartered in San Francisco, offering tools for investors and detailed company profiles. It has raised over $50 million in venture capital funding.
BTI Bank, also known as Varo, is a fintech company with a national bank charter, offering tech-first banking services and financial products. It has raised over $1.7 billion and is valued at over $25.5 billion. Varo aims to empower financial resilience through accessible banking solutions.
Dealroom is a data platform for tech ecosystems, founded in 2013 in Amsterdam, and raised €5.8 million in 2025 to expand globally. It provides real-time intelligence and tracks innovation ecosystems worldwide.
